title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
